text.title: A/B Testing Ads Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: confidence unreachable; pool more spend or skip
wire learnings DB first; otherwise verdicts evaporate

branch.when: spend_per_test >= 200 AND tests_registry == true AND variables_to_change > 1

conclusion.verdict: split into N sequential single-variable tests

branch.when: spend_per_test >= 200 AND tests_registry == true AND variables_to_change == 1 AND priority_variable_skipped == true
spend_per_test >= 200 AND tests_registry == true AND variables_to_change == 1 AND priority_variable_skipped == false

conclusion.verdict: pre-calc sample size; launch with equal budget; log verdict at 95%

example.trace: spend_per_test >= 200 AND tests_registry == true AND variables_to_change == 1 AND priority_variable_skipped == false → conclusion ref="sample-size-pre-calc" verdict="pre-calc sample size; launch with equal budget; log verdict at 95%"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
